texto: The illusion of free will, of freedom, is a useful tool you know. Let people think they are free and present them with a danger to their so-called freedom, a fear. It’s amazing how much you can get them to deal with just as long as you tell them they’re still free.
explicacao: Citação de Jordon Greene sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “The illusion of free will, of freedom, is a useful tool you know. Let people think they are free …” articula reflexao, freedom, illusion em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como illusion e liberty.

seo.titleSeo: "The illusion of free will, of freedom, is a useful t…" — Jordon Greene | Metamensagem
seo.descriptionSeo: Citação de Jordon Greene sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “The illusion of free will, of freedom, is a useful tool you know. Let people think they are fre…

frase_original: The illusion of free will, of freedom, is a useful tool you know. Let people think they are free and present them with a danger to their so-called freedom, a fear. It’s amazing how much you can get them to deal with just as long as you tell them they’re still free.

texto: Fear, that’s the great motivator though. Fear keeps it all in check. Fear of one’s neighbor. Fear of those who don’t look like you. Fear of those who live in some barren desert halfway across the globe,” Sean continued. “Domestic terrorism, just as much as fear of those abroad has helped people accept more intrusion into their everyday lives. To accept less freedom as freedom itself.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jordon Greene: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de enfrentar incertezas com ação. O trecho “Fear, that’s the great motivator though. Fear keeps it all in check. Fear of one’s neighbor. Fear…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, fear, freedom pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de viagem e freedom.
